name: Turkey Vegetable Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 1 medium onion, sliced thin and separated into rings
1 package (16 oz.) sliced mushrooms, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine sour cream, sherry, and mustard; set aside.
2. In a large skillet, sauté garlic and crushed red pepper flakes in olive oil for about 2 minutes.
3. Add carrots and chicken broth; simmer, covered, over medium heat for 5 minutes.
4. Add onion and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Stir in turkey, mushrooms, soy sauce, and flour. Simmer, covered, until mushrooms are tender (5-7 minutes).
6. Stir in the sour cream mixture; cook until heated through. Do not boil.
7. Cook noodles according to package directions, using 2 teaspoons salt in water. Drain.
8. Serve stroganoff over noodles; sprinkle with snipped parsley. Serves 4.
